meta.note: subscription auth; codex reports tokens, not USD

A.missing: Drops profuse degree and the quality-of-abundance reading; carries only that many things exist.
A.reason: It gives a generic quantity statement, not the quality of exceptionally abundant amount.

B.missing: Replaces abundance of things with abundance of kinds of a thing.
B.reason: Many kinds is diversity, not wealth in the sense of profuse abundance.

C.missing: Recasts wealth as a kind of very big many things rather than a quality of profuse abundance.
C.reason: Its genus is malformed and it incorrectly makes size criterial.

D.missing: Adds a location-exclusive distribution and drops the quality of profuse abundance.
D.reason: Wealth does not mean that abundance exists here but not in many other places.

E.missing: Adds social belief and bigness, while carrying only generic abundance.
E.reason: The asserted public judgment and kind-of-big-thing analysis are not part of this sense.
